hotels.description_en:
The Hotel Vilhelmine offers cosy and spacious rooms with a historic ambience in the old town of Liepaja, only a few minutesâ€™ walk from the main tourist attractions and the beach. 

The hotel is located in an over 100-year-old renovated building, which is included in the Historical Heritage list of Latvia. In the interior of hotel you can see original stairs, paintings and maps of Liepaja from that time.

Sights nearby include the Cathedral of the Holy Trinity, Jurmala Park and the beach promenade. Hotel Vilhelmine is easily accessible by public transport.

Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 9.6 for a two-person trip.
